# NourNest

> NourNest Apartments is the trading name of NourNest Ltd (Companies House 16629708), an independent London serviced apartment management company. NourNest currently operates 8 fully equipped serviced apartments across two Central London neighbourhoods: Old Street & Shoreditch (7 apartments) and Borough & Pimlico (1 apartment). Apartments have fitted kitchens, in-unit laundry, self check-in (smart lock on most apartments, in-person key handover on the rest), and all bills (electricity, water, heating, Wi-Fi, council tax) included in the nightly price. Housekeeping available on request; included as fortnightly mid-stay clean on long stays. Minimum stay 3 nights; long-stay pricing steps down for stays of one week or more. NourNest direct rates are at least 10% lower than the same apartment listed on Booking.com or Airbnb. Because NourNest does not pay platform commission, the saving is passed back to guests. Registered office: 154 Warwick Road, London W14 8PS. Director: Gerda Micke. Direct contact: hello@nournestapartments.com.

## London Neighbourhoods

- [Old Street & Shoreditch](https://nournestapartments.com/locations/old-street-shoreditch): Creative and tech corridor with seven NourNest apartments — Old Street Flat 1, Old Street Flat 2, Old Street Flat 3, Old Street Basement, Liverpool Road, Hackney Flat 1B, Shoreditch Flat 5. Suits founders, designers, consultants on short engagements and weekly stays.
- [Borough & Pimlico](https://nournestapartments.com/locations/borough-pimlico): 163 New Kent Road. Walkable to Borough Market, Tate Modern, and the Thames. Weekend leisure stays and foodie trips.

## Apartments

- [All apartments](https://nournestapartments.com/apartments): Browse the full NourNest catalogue with bedroom count, size, and from-price per night.

## Stays

- [Corporate stays](https://nournestapartments.com/corporate): Long-stay rates, monthly billing on PO terms, single point of contact for relocations and project teams.
- [Apartments vs hotels](https://nournestapartments.com/apartments-vs-hotels): Side-by-side on space, cost, kitchen, laundry, and family suitability.
- [FAQ](https://nournestapartments.com/faq): Stay length, what's included, check-in, pets, extensions, corporate bookings, family stays.
- [About NourNest](https://nournestapartments.com/about): Company information and what we believe.

## Brand

- Operator: NourNest Ltd (Companies House 16629708, incorporated 5 August 2025)
- Registered office: 154 Warwick Road, London W14 8PS
- Director: Gerda Micke
- Inventory: 8 fully equipped serviced apartments (Old Street & Shoreditch · 7 · Borough & Pimlico · 1)
- Currency: GBP
- Language: en-GB (UK spelling)
- Direct contact: hello@nournestapartments.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nournest_apartments/
- All bills included: yes (electricity, water, heating, Wi-Fi, council tax)
- Housekeeping: fortnightly included; additional cleans on request
- Self check-in: yes (smart lock on most apartments; in-person key handover on the rest)
- Minimum stay: 3 nights
- Long-stay discount threshold: one week or more
- Direct-vs-OTA rate: NourNest direct rates are at least 10% lower than Booking.com or Airbnb
- Tone of voice: welcoming, warm, home away from home
